name: ExtensionAttachment_Width
title: R5: Width of the image in pixels (photo/video) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Attachment.width` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Attachment.width` 0..1 `positiveInt`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Attachment.width` 0..1 `positiveInt`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Attachment.width` has a context of Attachment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Attachment`.
Element `Attachment.width` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Width of the image in pixels (photo/video) (new)
